promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch after the v0.1 Axis-0 options reduction because v0.2 adds admission-prep posture, clock-order formalization, shell-bookkeeping minimalism, and sim-linked ratchet order.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest v0.2 deltas and makes them reusable without rereading raw source.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The prior v0.1 A2-mid batch was used to avoid duplicating the broad options menu and keep this pass focused on v0.2 deltas.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until the v0.2 bridge additions were reduced into a smaller reusable packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The v0.2 parent batch plus the existing v0.1 A2-mid comparison anchor were sufficient to isolate the reusable bridge deltas and preserved contradictions for this pass.

candidate_items.name: DRAFT_QUARANTINE_WITH_ADMISSION_PREP_PATTERN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest v0.2 meta-pattern for extracting admission material without granting source-local authority.

candidate_items.name: NONMETAPHYSICAL_MONOTONE_I_SCALAR_CONTRACT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Isolates the cleanest reusable operational clock criterion in the Axis-0 v0.2 bridge.

candidate_items.name: SHELL_TO_NESTED_FACTORIZATION_BASELINE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest current shell compression rule while keeping geometry overlays deferred.

candidate_items.name: INHERITED_FOUR_FAMILY_MENU_WITH_FINITE_STEP_GRADIENTS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the v0.2 candidate-family menu available in compressed form without rebuilding the larger v0.1 options surface.

candidate_items.name: BOUNDED_JK_FUZZ_TO_KRAUS_ENVIRONMENT_ROUTE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest path-language to QIT translation route in the parent batch without silently licensing the full machinery stack.

candidate_items.name: SIM_CONTACT_WITH_GEOMETRY_LAST_RATCHET_ORDER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest downstream-facing discipline tying current sim contact to a staged geometry-last build order.

quarantined_items.name: SOURCE_LOCAL_TERM_SELF_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch prepares candidate admission material but does not self-authorize term admission.

quarantined_items.name: UNIVERSAL_CLOCK_AS_PRIMITIVE_TIME
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The operational monotone criterion must not be overread into primitive-time ontology.

quarantined_items.name: KRAUS_STINESPRING_STACK_AS_ALREADY_LICENSED_SUBSTRATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch offers a bounded formalization route, not blanket licensing of expanded substrate machinery.

quarantined_items.name: HOLOGRAPHIC_OR_CODE_SUBSPACE_REIMPORT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Current admissible form remains nested bookkeeping with geometry overlays explicitly deferred.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_ALIGNMENT_AS_LOCKED_AXIS0_WINNER
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Sim contact remains comparison material and does not settle the Axis-0 family choice.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest v0.2 bridge deltas and reusable ordering rules without recreating the larger v0.1 options packet.
They keep source lineage and contradiction markers explicit while remaining proposal-side and noncanon.
They preserve downstream comparability with later v0.3 reduction work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain admission, ontology, or stack-inflation overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to mine them as tensions, but not to promote them into active law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the prior v0.1 A2-mid reduction only as a comparison anchor to keep this packet small.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded v0.2 bridge-ordering reduction pass.
